extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz won the 36.2km ITT by 25 seconds over BEVIN, taking 3+ minutes from QUINTANA to claim race lead
tactical_patterns: ROGLIC took exactly 2 minutes from LOPEZ despite starting only 2 minutes behind, catching and passing him before finish line.
BEVIN split performance shows most GC men fade in final 12km segment compared to specialist TTers maintaining power.
POGACAR lost over 1 minute to BEVIN in second segment after leading at first check, revealing stamina weakness.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: 19 seconds up at 12km check on next best rider reveals he paced perfectly for 36km effort
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: 3+ minute loss and 27th place suggests TT weakness worse than expected for someone defending GC
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: neutral: faded significantly in final 24km after leading first check, suggesting pacing inexperience at 20 years old
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: negative: being caught and passed by rider starting 2 minutes behind reveals inability to sustain threshold effort
rider_signals.BEVIN Paddy: positive: 2 seconds faster than CAVAGNA at second check after being 1 second down at first shows superior pacing strategy
